reasons: Franco can punish Yi-Sun-Shin with hook or suppression when Yi-Sun-Shin steps into objective zones.
Suppression is especially useful because Yi-Sun-Shin's normal mobility timing does not solve hard lockdown.

proof.summary: Yi-Sun-Shin wants flexible mobility and safe jungle tempo, while Franco can force one caught position into a suppression pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Franco controls river bushes near Turtle or Lord.
Franco saves suppression after Yi-Sun-Shin uses his mobility.
failureCases: Franco misses hook and loses zone control.
Yi-Sun-Shin plays behind tank vision and keeps mobility available.

reasons: Hilda can pressure Yi-Sun-Shin early by invading bushes and contesting jungle paths.
Yi-Sun-Shin is weaker when his jungle tempo is delayed before he reaches item momentum.

proof.summary: Yi-Sun-Shin wants clean jungle scaling, while Hilda can disrupt early rotations with bush sustain, movement pressure, and repeated skirmish threat.
worksBestWhen: Hilda invades with mid or roam support.
Hilda tracks buff timers and forces Yi-Sun-Shin away from farm.
failureCases: Hilda invades alone into multiple enemies.
Yi-Sun-Shin's team protects jungle entrances well.

reasons: Saber can punish Yi-Sun-Shin when his mobility is unavailable or after he enters too far for enhanced basic attacks.
Yi-Sun-Shin is vulnerable to targeted burst if caught without frontline protection.

proof.summary: Yi-Sun-Shin wants to weave in and out with weapon switching, while Saber can punish the cooldown window after his mobility is spent.
worksBestWhen: Saber waits for Yi-Sun-Shin's mobility before using ultimate.
Saber attacks from fog near jungle entrances.
failureCases: Yi-Sun-Shin keeps mobility and team peel available.

reasons: Lolita can protect allies from ranged basic attacks and projectile pressure during siege or objective fights.
This reduces some of Yi-Sun-Shin's ranged poke value before his team can commit.

proof.summary: Yi-Sun-Shin can pressure from range, while Lolita can block many ranged basic attacks and projectile patterns for her team.
worksBestWhen: Lolita faces Yi-Sun-Shin during objective standoffs.
The team uses Lolita's shield to cross dangerous space.
failureCases: Yi-Sun-Shin waits out the shield or uses melee timing.

reasons: Khufra can make Yi-Sun-Shin's dash paths more dangerous near objectives and jungle walls.
This counter is timing-dependent because Yi-Sun-Shin has mobility tools that can avoid poor Khufra timing.

proof.summary: Yi-Sun-Shin uses mobility for repositioning, while Khufra can threaten blink movement if he controls the path and times the punish correctly.
worksBestWhen: Khufra guards choke points before Yi-Sun-Shin enters.
Khufra waits out or predicts the mobility timing.
failureCases: Yi-Sun-Shin uses mobility at the correct moment.
Khufra commits his anti-dash timing too early.
